notes: Power inlets are described by Focusrite only as 'Dual PSUs with locking IEC inlets' — the specific locking IEC variant (e.g. Neutrik PowerCON, powerCON TRUE1, latching C14) is not identified in any official documentation or reseller listing. Mapped as 'iec'. The DB25 connectors follow AES59 pinout (8 channels AES3 per connector, combined I/O). EtherCON ports accept standard RJ45 as well.

ports.name: AES3 I/O A
ports.note: DB25 AES59 — carries 8 channels AES3 in + 8 channels AES3 out

ports.name: AES3 I/O B
ports.note: DB25 AES59 — carries 8 channels AES3 in + 8 channels AES3 out

ports.name: AES3 / DARS In
ports.note: Alternate AES3 input; also used as optional DARS (Digital Audio Reference Signal) input

ports.name: S/PDIF In
ports.note: S/PDIF input; replaces DB25 channels 3–4 when active

ports.name: Network A
ports.note: Primary Dante network; EtherCON NE8FBH-S; also accepts standard RJ45

ports.name: Network B
ports.note: Secondary/redundant Dante network; EtherCON NE8FBH-S; also accepts standard RJ45

ports.name: AC Power A
ports.note: Locking IEC inlet (specific locking variant unconfirmed — Focusrite spec says only 'locking IEC inlets'); PSU A of dual redundant supply; 100–240V 50/60Hz 30VA

ports.name: AC Power B
ports.note: Locking IEC inlet (specific locking variant unconfirmed); PSU B of dual redundant supply; 100–240V 50/60Hz 30VA
